Sanitize style files for public release; add writing quality layer

- Remove internal product/team names from all 5 style files (Revolving,
  Lateness, Billing, Financing, DA, Credit Core, CC Orchestrator, Troy,
  F&F, D1PL, specific dates); replace with generic Feature A/B/C, Team X,

  no buzzwords, tight phrasing) applied to all style outputs

  and style violations (anti-pattern in leadership-polite, jargon in
  concise-professional, status framing in executive-summary)

commit.message:
Fix: AI still hallucinating dates - Compute temporal state explicitly

The model was ignoring "consultazione dal 21/03 al 23/03" and saying
"scrutinio starts today at 23:00" on March 7th.

Root cause: model doesn't connect date facts to temporal reasoning.

Fixes:
- Compute STATO TEMPORALE explicitly: "PRIMA della consultazione.
  Mancano 14 giorni." / "IN CORSO" / "DOPO. Terminata da X giorni."
- Restructure context injection: facts FIRST (wrapped in === DATI REALI ===),
  then user question. Model sees facts before the question.
- Remove duplicate date_context from vertex_service (already in profile)
- Add debug log for user profile context

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use body_path for release notes to avoid heredoc issues

GitHub Actions output with heredoc fails when content contains the
delimiter string. Using body_path with a file is more reliable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(hooks): fix skill suggestion fetch errors in user-prompt hook (#22)

* fix(hooks): fix skill suggestion fetch errors in user-prompt hook

Two bugs fixed:
- Response field mismatch: daemon returns `skills` but hook read
  `suggestions`, so suggestions never worked even with a live daemon
- Redundant fetch to dead daemon: track daemon liveness from the
  activity fetch and skip skill suggestion request when unreachable,
  eliminating noisy "fetch failed" log entries

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
powered by [succ](https://succ.ai)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: succ <mindpalace@succ.ai>

* fix(daemon): add retry limit to briefing pre-generation

When briefing generation fails (e.g. CLI not connecting), the idle
watcher retried every 30s indefinitely, flooding daemon.log with
hundreds of identical errors.

Add failure tracking with max 3 retries and 5-minute backoff.
Success resets the counter. Cache/state clears also reset failures.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
powered by [succ](https://succ.ai)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
BI V2.4: Zurück zu V2.1 Basis + Trend-Filter + Smart Money Min

V2.3 hat Performance verschlechtert (PF 1.59→1.13, P&L +24.9→+1.0%).
Ursache: Mittelstufen-Boost liess Dead Stocks wieder auf Grade B.

Revert auf V2.1 Signal-Gewichte (bewährt: +24.9%, PF 1.59):
- OBV Mittel: 10→7 zurück
- ADX Mittel: 11→9, Low: 6→4 zurück
- InstAccum Mittel: 11→9 zurück
- RelStr Mittel: 10→7 zurück
- OrderBlocks Mittel: 11→9, Low: 6→4 zurück
- Liquidity Mittel: 8→5 zurück
- Volume Filter: 1.15x→1.4x zurück (Original Minervini)

BEHALTEN von V2.2/V2.3 (diese halfen):
- Trend-Confirmation Filter (20-MA Richtung) → half WR auf 45.5%
- Smart Money Minimum: Min 2 Boosted-Signale pro Trade
- Trail-Stop 66% statt 50% nach TP1

Testen mit 500 Tickers statt 200 fuer mehr Trades bei gleicher Qualitaet.

commit.message:
Make rescore_all() incremental — only score new rounds

Instead of deleting boltz_scored.csv and re-parsing all PDBs from
every round (~20 min), track the last scored round with a marker
file and only score new round directories, appending to the existing
CSV. Reduces between-round scoring from ~20 min to ~5 min.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(billing): Module 8 — flexible billing system (#9)

* fix(ci): resolve cryptography build failure in CI pipeline

* fix(i18n): add lang_* keys for all 39 languages

* feat(ui): Module 2 — virtual on-screen keyboard (7 scripts)

- Add app/ui/virtual_keyboard.py with KEYBOARD_SCRIPTS (39 langs), KEYBOARD_LAYOUTS
  (7 scripts: arabic, nastaliq, devanagari, bengali, tamil, ethiopic, somali_latin),
  and public API: get_script_for_language(), needs_virtual_keyboard(),
  get_keyboard_output(), clear_keyboard_output(), render_virtual_keyboard()
- Add app/tests/test_virtual_keyboard.py — 55 tests across 5 classes, all passing
- Integrate render_virtual_keyboard("pi_summary", lang) into cv_builder.py after
  the professional summary text_area
- Add 6 new i18n keys (kb_backspace, kb_space, kb_clear, kb_dismiss,
  kb_show_keyboard, kb_hide_keyboard) with native-language translations to all
  39 language files (211 keys per file)

* fix(deps): rebuild requirements.txt for Linux CI compatibility

Removed 4 packages not imported anywhere in the codebase:
- appscript==1.4.0: macOS-only (Apple Script), no Linux binary wheel,
  fails to build from source on Linux (gcc error). Root cause of CI failure.
- xlwings==0.33.20: Windows/macOS Excel desktop automation, not a server
  dependency, not imported anywhere.
- pyroaring==1.0.3: not imported anywhere in the codebase.
- pyiceberg==0.11.0: heavyweight data lake library, not imported anywhere.

Updated 1 version pin:
- streamlit==1.54.0 -> 1.55.0 (latest stable; 1.55.0 is what installs
  on current Linux environment).

All 217 runnable tests still pass after these changes.

* feat(ui): Module 3 — RTL layout support (7 languages)

- Add app/ui/rtl_support.py with three public functions:
    apply_rtl_styles(lang): injects RTL CSS (html/body, inputs, textareas,
      selects, .stMarkdown, .stForm, flex row-reverse for columns, sidebar
      right-positioned, buttons right-aligned) via st.markdown when
      is_rtl(lang) is True; no-op for LTR languages.
    get_rtl_column_order(cols): reverses column list for RTL session language.
    rtl_text(text, lang): wraps text in direction:rtl span for RTL; returns
      plain text for LTR.
- Add app/tests/test_rtl_support.py — 59 tests across 4 classes, all passing.
- Integrate apply_rtl_styles(lang) into all 6 UI entry points that already
  call get_language(): cv_builder, ats_page, admin_page, coach_page,
  login_page, app.py.
- Add rtl flag to cv_service.export_cv() signature (bool, default False).
  RTL PDF rendering deferred to Module 15.

RTL languages covered: ar, ur, ps, fa, ku, he, sd.
All 276 tests pass (217 existing + 59 new).

* feat(security): Module 4 — hCaptcha integration

- Add app/security/captcha.py:
    verify_hcaptcha(token, secret): POSTs to hCaptcha siteverify API,
      returns True on success, False on failure/exception/empty args.
      Never raises. Handles network errors, timeouts, malformed responses.
    is_captcha_required(role): returns False for SystemAdmin (via
      has_permission() check on sysadmin.panel.access), True for all
      other roles and unauthenticated users (None).
    get_hcaptcha_site_key(): reads HCAPTCHA_SITE_KEY env var.
    get_hcaptcha_secret(): reads HCAPTCHA_SECRET env var.

- Add app/ui/captcha_widget.py:
    render_captcha_placeholder(lang): st.info banner + st.text_input
      for token paste. All labels via t(). Streamlit-phase implementation;
      full browser widget in Module 15 (React frontend).
    get_captcha_token_from_session(): returns token from session state.
    clear_captcha_token(): resets token after use.

- Modify app/services/auth_service.py: add captcha_token and captcha_role
  params to register() and login(). CAPTCHA enforced when HCAPTCHA_SECRET
  is set; SystemAdmin bypasses; raises AuthError("captcha_invalid") on
  failure.

- Add 5 captcha_* i18n keys to all 39 language files (216 keys per file):
  captcha_required, captcha_token_label, captcha_token_help,
  captcha_invalid, captcha_bypass_admin.

- Add HCAPTCHA_SITE_KEY and HCAPTCHA_SECRET placeholder entries to .env
  and .env.save.

- Fix cryptography C extension: installed working manylinux wheel to
  /usr/local/lib/python3.11/dist-packages/ overriding broken system
  package. All 364 tests now pass (was 276 runnable; 88 previously
  blocked by pyo3 panic now restored).

All 364 tests pass.

* feat(jobs): Module 5 — Adzuna job search integration

- Add app/services/job_search_service.py: search_jobs(), get_adzuna_app_id(),
  get_adzuna_api_key(), calculate_ats_match_for_job() — full Adzuna API client
  with graceful degradation (returns empty results when credentials missing)
- Add app/ui/pages/job_search_page.py: render_job_search() — full Streamlit
  page with keyword/location/radius/national/international search, paginated
  results, ATS match badge per job, save job, view job link
- Add app/tests/test_job_search.py: 20 tests — all passing (384 total)
- Add 19 job_search_* i18n keys to all 42 language files (235 keys/file)
- Add ADZUNA_APP_ID and ADZUNA_API_KEY to .env and .env.save
- Register job_search page in app/ui/app.py sidebar navigation (all users)
  and page routing dispatcher

https://claude.ai/code/session_019M6bL8o6z5WZTQ2SWg92GC

* feat(cv): Module 6 — cover letter generation

- Add app/services/cover_letter_service.py: generate_cover_letter(),
  get_cover_letter_templates(), tailor_cover_letter(),
  extract_matching_skills() — fully template-based, no external API,
  3 tones (professional/confident/concise), never raises
- Add app/ui/pages/cover_letter_page.py: render_cover_letter() — full
  Streamlit page with job title, company, job desc, tone selector,
  generate button, editable output, word count, ATS match score,
  download as .txt

* fix(arch): remove scoring_engine direct import from cover_letter_page

Move ATS scoring out of the UI layer into the service layer:
- Add score_letter_against_job() to cover_letter_service.py, which
  wraps score_cv_against_job internally so no UI page ever imports

commit.message:
fix(workflows): LockService não trava bootstrap quando Redis está indisponível

onModuleInit() chamava await this.client.connect() sem try-catch.
Se o Redis retornava ETIMEDOUT, o ioredis fechava a conexão e lançava
'Error: Connection is closed.' que propagava até o bootstrap e derrubava
o app inteiro com ERRO CRÍTICO.

Fix:
- connect() agora é fire-and-forget (.catch com log de warning)
- retryStrategy com backoff exponencial (igual ao BullMQ)
- error event apenas loga warning (não derruba o processo)
- onModuleDestroy com try-catch silencioso

fix: Add warn logging for silent auto-threading fallback [Midtown !2157] (#1882)

* fix: Add warn logging for silent auto-threading fallback in channel post

When MIDTOWN_TASK_ID is set but the task's thread/message lookup fails,
the fallback to a regular (unthreaded) post was completely silent. This
made it impossible to diagnose why reviewer channel posts appeared
top-level instead of threaded under their task.

Add an eprintln warning at the fallback point that includes the task ID
and error message. This appears in the coworker's stderr (session logs),
making the failure visible for debugging.

commit.message:
feat(lifecycle): add transparency to PDCA execution

This update improves trust and debuggability by showing exactly what
tools/skills are being called at each step of the PDCA cycle.

## Changes

### cycle.py - Transparency Improvements
- **run_cycle()**: Announce tools before each phase, show summary after
- **run()**: Add session start banner, track termination reason, show gap
- **run_until_target()**: Show progress gap between current and target
- **_print_summary()**: Add full audit trail with:
  - SESSION OVERVIEW (cycles, termination reason, target)
  - CYCLE DETAILS (per-cycle results with tools used)
  - AUDIT TRAIL (all skills/tools called)
  - SESSION TERMINATION (why we stopped)

### Termination Reasons
- `target_achieved`: Quality target met ✅
- `failed_at_*_phase`: Error encountered ❌
- `max_cycles_reached`: Hit cycle limit ⏱️
- `safety_limit_reached`: Hit iteration limit ⚠️

### Example Output
```
📋 PDCA SESSION SUMMARY
🔍 SESSION OVERVIEW:
  • Total Cycles: 3
  • Termination Reason: target_achieved
  • Target Pass Rate: 90%

🔧 AUDIT TRAIL - Tools/Skills Called:
  • check: creator_validate + eval_benchmark + internal_checks
  • do: skill_creator_init
```

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add payer policy download experiment (Experiment 44)

Automated pipeline to download anti-VEGF prior authorization policy
documents from 6 major payers (CMS Medicare, UHC, Aetna, BCBSTX,
Humana, Cigna). Includes download script with SHA-256 manifest
tracking, rule extractor for parsing PDFs into structured PA rules,
and YAML config with all payer URLs and search terms.

Initial run: 34 files (8.6 MB) across all 6 payers, 18 structured
rules extracted from UHC and Aetna policy PDFs.

commit.message:
fix: prevent pipeline from hanging in CI

enrich_from_off.py:
  - Add off_checked_at stamp (hit or miss) so products aren't re-checked
    every run — 30-day recheck window means 64 OFF-absent products are
    only retried monthly, not weekly
  - Cap enrichment at MAX_PER_RUN=60 products per CI run (~10 min max)
  - Tighten requests timeout to (8, 20) tuple to catch silent TCP hangs
  - Reduce MAX_RETRIES 3→2 and DELAY 2.0→1.0s

.github/workflows/pipeline.yml:
  - Split into per-script steps with individual timeout-minutes
  - continue-on-error: true on Shufersal, Rami Levy, and enrich steps
  - Job-level ceiling: 45 minutes
  - Enrich step hard-capped at 15 minutes

migration_01_off_checked_at.sql: ALTER TABLE to add off_checked_at column

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Verse (UEFN) language support (.verse)

Adds regex-based parser for Epic's Verse language, targeting UEFN API digest files. Key highlights:

- 5-pass regex extraction: containers, extension methods, methods, variables, constants
- `char_pos_to_byte_pos()` helper correctly handles multi-byte UTF-8 (smart quotes affect ~60% of symbols in Fortnite.digest.verse)
- 4,556 symbols extracted from all 3 standard UEFN digest files
- 99.9% token reduction vs loading full digest files (~200k tokens → ~94 per lookup)
- Tests added covering all symbol kinds and the UTF-8 byte offset correctness

- Display as indented list like other scan output

Added comprehensive tests:
- 8 integration tests for output formatting
- 5 property-based tests using hypothesis for file classification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(scan): address PR #185 review feedback

- Sort unknown files before output for deterministic ordering
- Fix recognized_count calculation to handle legacy Path objects
- Strengthen truncation test with explicit assertions
- Add boundary tests for exactly 10 and 11 files
- Add test for directories with only unknown files
- Use explicit enum value checking in JSON tests
- Add tests for special characters, unicode, and long filenames

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(test): use cross-platform safe chars in property tests

Hypothesis was generating Unicode characters that are invalid for
filenames on macOS ("Illegal byte sequence") and Windows ("Invalid
argument" for control characters 0x00-0x1F).

Fix by using ASCII alphanumeric only in extension generation - this
is sufficient to test the classification property without filesystem
edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
init: AFL YouTube highlights watchlist sync

Polls the AFL YouTube channel for new Match Highlights videos and adds
them to a configured watchlist playlist. Uses Google OAuth2 with offline
refresh tokens (token.pickle, not committed).

Setup: add client_secret.json, run once to generate token.pickle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
